author: arisboch
text:
When I try to download private Instagram posts, then nothing gets downloaded and I get the following error message:

```
% gallery-dl --verbose  https://www.instagram.com/p/[redacted]/
[gallery-dl][debug] Version 1.15.3-dev
[gallery-dl][debug] Python 3.6.9 - Linux-4.4.0-18362-Microsoft-x86_64-with-Ubuntu-18.04-bionic
[gallery-dl][debug] requests 2.24.0 - urllib3 1.25.11
[gallery-dl][debug] Starting DownloadJob for 'https://www.instagram.com/p/[redacted]/'
[instagram][debug] Using InstagramImageExtractor for 'https://www.instagram.com/p/[redacted]/'
[urllib3.connectionpool][debug] Starting new HTTPS connection (1): www.instagram.com:443
[urllib3.connectionpool][debug] https://www.instagram.com:443 "GET /p/[redacted]/?__a=1 HTTP/1.1" 404 2
[instagram][warning] Unable to fetch data from 'https://www.instagram.com/p/[redacted]/':  KeyError: 'graphql'
[instagram][debug] Server response: {}
```

Edit: Disregard that, the session ID did just expire. Sorry.
